track_listing.track: No Quarter (LP- Houses Of The Holy) Atlantic
TV pays tribute to AC/DC singer, Bon Scott who died during the week
Castle Walls (LP - The Grand Illusion) A&M
King Of Hollywood (LP - The Long Run) Asylum
I Like To Rock (LP - Harder.....Faster) Aquarius

transcript.text: The Houses of the Holy, the album that came out in 1973. The track was ACDC, and a couple of tracks from If You Want Blood, You've Got It.
The track there you heard was High Voltage, the title of their first ever album that came out in 1976.
And prior to that you heard Rock and Roll Damnation, which was a hit for them. It got to number 24 in June 1978.
Little bit of a tribute to the gentleman that sang lead vocals for them, who was found dead in a car around the middle of this week.
from alcohol poisoning his name was bon scott and he'll be sadly missed near perfection i think as
any musicians in the world can get to is one of my all-time favorite tracks and that was the
